paths.name: Instructor create draft → edit/save → curriculum save → return to management
paths.semanticGoal: Cover instructor creation and mutation write-paths: create course, update course, mutate curriculum, then verify instructor list reloads.

paths.name: Already-owned purchase → reader load fail retry → completion blocked → return to detail
paths.semanticGoal: Validate duplicate purchase blocking, reader retry behavior, blocked lesson completion (no bad writes), and safe navigation back to marketing detail.

paths.name: Admin reject blocked (missing reason) → reject success → activate/deactivate user
paths.semanticGoal: Validate rejection reason enforcement, successful rejection persistence, then a high-risk user activation write-path.

paths.name: Admin taxonomy mutate rejected → saved → stats → back to marketplace
paths.semanticGoal: Cover taxonomy mutation write-path with both reject and success, then validate stats navigation does not leak admin controls into public pages.

paths.name: Admin republish blocked → republish success → admin review load failure retry
paths.semanticGoal: Validate lifecycle republish guardrails (blocked then success) and confirm admin review retry flow after load failure.

paths.name: Register rejected → switch login → browse → hidden course detail → return
paths.semanticGoal: Exercise registration validation failures and ensure hidden/unpublished course detail does not leak data and can return safely to browsing.

paths.name: Curriculum hidden → retry path with load fail → mutation rejected → return to edit
paths.semanticGoal: Validate curriculum access controls, retry behavior on system failure, rejected mutation safety, and return navigation to editing.

paths.name: Instructor submit for review blocked → retry success → marketplace view
paths.semanticGoal: Validate course submission state machine, including blocked submission (no illegal state change) and successful queueing.

paths.name: Admin approve course → queue empty → archive via lifecycle → verify reload
paths.semanticGoal: Exercise admin review decision approval write-path and admin lifecycle archive write-path, ensuring navigation and reload consistency.

paths.name: Register success → student login → reader forbidden → purchase blocked → recover
paths.semanticGoal: Validate role/session creation, reader authorization denial, and blocked purchase behavior with safe return to course detail.

paths.name: Guest browse → purchase → read → complete lesson
paths.semanticGoal: Cover guest discovery, purchase write-path, owned library load, reader access, and lesson completion write-path with a long connected journey.

paths.name: Courses list fail/empty loops → course detail fail retry → back to list
paths.semanticGoal: Stress resilience for public browsing and course detail loading with retry semantics and correct state transitions.

paths.name: Admin role change rejected → role stored → return to review
paths.semanticGoal: Exercise user role mutation with both rejected and successful outcomes, ensuring list reload consistency and safe navigation back to admin review.

paths.name: Edit load fail → retry → update rejected → recover editor
paths.semanticGoal: Combine unwalked edit-page load failure/retry with a high-risk update rejection path to ensure no partial writes and editor recovery remains consistent.

paths.name: Admin stats load fail → retry → review role blocked → public courses
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin stats failure/retry, then unwalked review roleBlocked and safe return to public course list.

paths.name: Instructor load fail → retry → lifecycle blocked → return
paths.semanticGoal: Stress unwalked instructor list failure/retry, then take unwalked lifecycle entry and unwalked archiveBlocked to ensure no partial state changes.

paths.name: Taxonomy load fail → retry → roleBlocked → public browse recover
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked taxonomy load failure/retry, then unwalked roleBlocked and safe redirect to public browsing to confirm no admin state leaks after repeated failures.

paths.name: Admin users load fail → retry → stats → back to users
paths.semanticGoal: Stress unwalked admin user list failure + retry, then validate unwalked navigation to stats and back keeps data consistent.

paths.name: Guest home → login → register → browse → detail → back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked guest entry to home and cross-page navigation, then verify public browsing and course detail round-trip stays consistent.

paths.name: Guest hits my-courses → forbidden → login → public browse
paths.semanticGoal: Ensure unauthenticated access to owned library is blocked, and post-login navigation stays consistent without leaking owned data.

paths.name: Instructor page blocked → marketplace → home → register
paths.semanticGoal: Exercise unwalked instructor role-blocking and safe fallback to public browsing, then validate guest navigation from home to register.

paths.name: My courses load fail → retry → browse more
paths.semanticGoal: Stress unwalked my-courses failure + retry transitions, then take unwalked browseMore to ensure state clears and public browsing still works.

paths.name: Admin stats roleBlocked → fallback to courses (unwalked) via admin flow
paths.semanticGoal: Enter stats through a valid admin session, then cover unwalked roleBlocked and forbidden-to-courses routing to ensure safe degradation without admin UI leakage.

paths.name: Admin taxonomy ↔ users ↔ review (unwalked connectors)
paths.semanticGoal: Expand coverage of unwalked cross-admin navigation (taxonomy→users, users→taxonomy, taxonomy→review) while verifying reload transitions each time.

paths.name: Admin courses role blocked → back to public → home → login
paths.semanticGoal: Validate unwalked admin-course roleBlocked and safe return to public pages without admin UI leakage, then take unwalked home→login.

paths.name: My courses empty → browse public → open detail
paths.semanticGoal: Validate unwalked empty-library state and its browse-out connector, then confirm public course list and detail load normally.

paths.name: Non-admin users blocked → return to courses → home
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-users role-blocking and ensure safe redirect to public pages, then confirm public navigation returns to home without admin artifacts.

paths.name: Create draft rejected → retry → create success → open editor
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked draft rejection and retry path, then ensure successful draft creation opens edit flow with correct course context.

paths.name: Login denied → recover → courses list retry/empty → home
paths.semanticGoal: Validate login denial handling and resilient public browsing with failure/empty/retry loops, ending in a clean navigation back to home.

paths.name: Instructor edit unauthorized hidden → return → public course hidden
paths.semanticGoal: Ensure unauthorized instructor editing behaves like 404/hidden, and public course hidden state remains non-leaky.

paths.name: Admin courses load fail → retry → recover to review
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin course-management load failure and retry, ensuring recovery restores the ready state and review navigation remains consistent.

paths.name: Instructor create course → cancel → verify lists → marketplace
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked create-course entry and cancel behavior (no accidental writes), then confirm instructor list reloads and can return to marketplace.
